description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted radiator with a tall, rectangular form and a slim profile. The front face features a series of evenly spaced, vertical tubular columns connected at the top and bottom by horizontal manifolds, providing efficient heat dissipation. The radiator is constructed primarily from metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a smooth, glossy white finish that gives it a clean and contemporary appearance. The side views reveal its minimal depth, emphasizing its space-saving design, while the back appears to be a solid, flat panel for flush wall mounting. Pipe connection points are visible at the bottom, suggesting compatibility with standard plumbing systems. No visible control valves or decorative grilles are present, highlighting its minimalist aesthetic.
description: A tall, slim, wall-mounted radiator with vertical tubular columns and a smooth, glossy white finish. It features bottom pipe connections and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing vertical tubular columns and the main heat-dissipating surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the radiator's slim profile and protruding columns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless back panel for wall mounting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim depth and column arrangement.
attribute_pipe_connections: two bottom entry points, horizontally aligned
